title: ghinia verbenacea
intro: Ghinia verbenacea, also known as the Peruvian lomatium or lomatium, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the carrot family. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to stimulate the immune system and fight off infections, and has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including respiratory issues and skin conditions. The health benefits of Ghinia verbenacea include its anti-inflammatory and antiviral properties, which can help to reduce inflammation and prevent the spread of infections. Herbal preparations of Ghinia verbenacea can be made into teas, tinctures, and salves, and are often used to treat colds, flu, and other viral infections.
